name: translator-raycast
title: Russian ⇄ English Translator
description: Translate between Russian and English — detects the direction automatically and explains single words.
author: mikhail_chigrin

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translator
commands.subtitle: Russian ⇄ English
commands.description: Translate the selected text (or clipboard) between Russian and English — direction detected automatically; the result is copied and shown in a HUD, with English synonyms for single words

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: Free key — aistudio.google.com → Get API key (free tier)

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Gemini Model
preferences.description: Gemini model ID. Default gemini-3.1-flash-lite. Other options: gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-2.5-flash-lite
